name: Honeymole
description: Deploy multiple sensors that redirect traffic to a centralized collection of honeypots. Tool: https://web.archive.org/web/20100326040550/http://www.honeynet.org.pt:80/index.php/HoneyMole. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #457 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Honeymole output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Honeymole output file to parse instead of running it live.
